Class Package

java.lang.Object
com.amazingco.Package
public class Package extends Object
Package entity used by Amazingco systems. Holds package code, storage end date, price and flags for exceeded deadline, certified delivery, payment, pickup and return status. For certified deliveries the package contains a list of allowed identifiers (IDs) authorized to collect it. The package code must have ten digits: the first nine are digits and the tenth is the remainder of the sum of the first nine digits modulo 10.

Packages that are not paid may only be delivered at points supporting cash-on-delivery. Certified deliveries may only be performed at PostOffice locations. The class provides two constructors: one for certified packages (with authorized IDs) and another for non-certified packages.

    Package(Integer price, Boolean paid, String packageCode)
    Constructor for non-certified packages.
    Package(Integer price, Boolean paid, ArrayList<String> identifications, String packageCode)

  • Constructor Details

    • Package

      public Package(Integer price, Boolean paid, String packageCode)
      Constructor for non-certified packages.
      Parameters:
      price - Integer representing the package price
      paid - Boolean indicating whether the package has been paid
      packageCode - String representing the package code

    • Package

      public Package(Integer price, Boolean paid, ArrayList<String> identifications, String packageCode)
      Constructor for certified packages.
      Parameters:
      price - Integer representing the package price
      paid - Boolean indicating whether the package has been paid
      identifications - Array of strings of IDs authorized to pick up the package at a PostOffice
      packageCode - String representing the package code

  • Method Details

    • getIdentifications

      public ArrayList<String> getIdentifications()
      Returns the list of identifiers authorized to pick up this package at a PostOffice.
      Returns:
      Array of strings of authorized identifiers

    • addIdentification

      public void addIdentification(String id)
      Adds an identifier to the list of authorized IDs for this package.
      Parameters:
      id - String identifier to add
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if id is null, the package has already been picked up, or the package is not certified

    • isCertified

      public Boolean isCertified()
      Returns whether this package is certified.
      Returns:
      Boolean indicating certification status

    • getPrice

      public Integer getPrice()
      Returns the package price.
      Returns:
      Integer representing the price

    • isPaid

      public Boolean isPaid()
      Returns whether the package has been paid.
      Returns:
      Boolean indicating payment status

      protected void setPaid(Boolean paid)
      Sets the paid flag for this package.
      Parameters:
      paid - Boolean indicating payment status
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if paid is null

      public String getPackageCode()
      Returns the package code.
      Returns:
      String representing the package code

    • getStorageEndDate

      public LocalDate getStorageEndDate()
      Returns the storage end date for this package.
      Returns:
      LocalDate representing the storage end date

    • setStorageEndDate

      protected void setStorageEndDate(LocalDate storageEndDate)
      Sets the storage end date for this package.
      Parameters:
      storageEndDate - LocalDate representing the storage end date
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if storageEndDate is null

    • isPickedUp

      public Boolean isPickedUp()
      Returns whether the package has been picked up.
      Returns:
      Boolean indicating pickup status

    • setPickedUp

      protected void setPickedUp(Boolean pickedUp)
      Sets the picked-up flag for this package.
      Parameters:
      pickedUp - Boolean indicating pickup status
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if pickedUp is null or the package has already been returned

    • isReturned

      public Boolean isReturned()
      Returns whether the package has been returned.
      Returns:
      Boolean indicating return status

    • setReturned

      protected void setReturned(Boolean returned)
      Sets the returned flag for this package.
      Parameters:
      returned - Boolean indicating return status
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if returned is null or the package has already been picked up

    • isOverdue

      public Boolean isOverdue(LocalDate date)
      Returns whether the package has exceeded its storage deadline compared to the provided date.
      Parameters:
      date - LocalDate to compare against
      Returns:
      Boolean indicating whether the package is overdue
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if date is null

    • setOverdue

      protected void setOverdue(Boolean overdue)
      Sets the overdue flag for this package.
      Parameters:
      overdue - Boolean indicating overdue status
